title: Video Habitat Observation Extension
description: 11 additional fields for video-sourced habitats (TikTok, IG, YouTube). Applied ON TOP of the base 52-field habitat observation sheet.

video_count_scraped.description: Volume of video content found for this habitat

median_view_count.description: Typical reach of videos in this habitat

viral_videos_found.description: Any videos meeting VIRAL threshold from score_virality.py

viral_video_count.description: Number of VIRAL-tier videos (computed by score_virality.py, not by agent)

comment_sections_active.description: Do videos have substantive comment discussions (not just emoji/tags)

hook_formats_identifiable.description: Can distinct hook patterns be extracted from video openings

creator_diversity.description: Content not dominated by a single account

contains_objection_language.description: Comments contain skepticism, pushback, or doubt

contains_purchase_intent.description: Comments mention buying, trying, or recommending products
